fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. scan --force detects tickets in redb index missing from disk and removes them from both redb and Tantivy. 2. Reports pruned count in output JSON. 3. Regular scan unchanged. 4. Never deletes ticket.toml files.
fields.title: Bug: scan --force does not prune orphan entries from redb index
